seo_title: EGO Power+ Z6 Zero-Turn Mower — Land Discovery
seo_description: Instead of gas lawn care, consider the EGO Power+ Z6 42-inch zero-turn mower — battery-powered cutting with honest context for your land ecosystem.

faqs.q: How much lawn can it handle?
faqs.a: EGO markets up to 4 acres per charge for the Z6 platform. Real-world runtime depends on grass height, terrain, and speed.

faqs.q: Is this right for my property?
faqs.a: Zero-turn mowers shine on larger, open lawns. For small urban yards, a smaller EGO mower may be a better fit.
